nodes.name: 長鬚鴞
nodes.summary: 長鬚鴞（Long-whiskered owlet，学名 Xenoglaux loweryi），在图谱中标记为易危（VU）物种，主要分布于灌木林，常见栖息地包括山地森林。

nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

nodes.name: 灌木林
nodes.summary: 灌木林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联86种鸟类，包括Swallow-tailed nightjar、蓝臀毛腿蜂鸟、黄翅星额蜂鸟等86种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: VU
nodes.summary: VU表示 IUCN 易危等级，当前关联694种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、索马里鸵鸟、大斑几维鸟等694种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It inhabits humid montane forest and elfin forest. The original authors described the area at Abra Patricia as fog-shrouded and heavy with moss, bromeliads, epiphytes, and other vegetation above a forest floor with a thick layer of humus

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It inhabits humid montane forest and elfin forest. The original authors described the area at Abra Patricia as fog-shrouded and heavy with moss, bromeliads, epiphytes, and other vegetation above a forest floor with a thick layer of humus
